results.title: A Culture of Coexistence Imperiled: Addressing the Violations in Arsi Zone
results.description: A deeply concerning humanitarian and security crisis continues to unfold in the Arsi Zone of Ethiopia’s Oromia region, demanding immediate, high-level attention and a coordinated institutional response. Over the past several months, a succession of tragic violent incidents and subsequent displacements has severely impacted local communities, shaking the foundations of peaceful coexistence in historically diverse [...]

results.title: Ukraine launches massive attack on Russia hours after Putin snubs 'rude' Zelensky
results.description: Kyiv sent a barrage of missiles at Russia with a fire started at a military base hours after Vladimir Putin snubbed Volodymyr Zelensky’s call for face-to-face talks to end the war.
